typeDescription.name: org.texttechnologylab.annotation.type.RecognizedTaxon
typeDescription.description: Annotation type for recognized taxon mentions.

featureDescription.name: resolutions
featureDescription.description: List of taxon resolutions associated with this recognized taxon.

featureDescription.name: text
featureDescription.description: The text of the recognized taxon.

typeDescription.name: org.texttechnologylab.annotation.type.TaxonResolution
typeDescription.description: Annotation type for matching taxon information to a taxonomic database.

featureDescription.name: recognizedTaxon
featureDescription.description: Reference to the taxon in the document that was recognized.

featureDescription.name: provider
featureDescription.description: The provider of the taxon resolution information.

featureDescription.name: taxonId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the taxon in the taxonomic database.

featureDescription.name: kingdomName
featureDescription.description: The name of the kingdom to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: kingdomId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the kingdom to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: phylumName
featureDescription.description: The name of the phylum to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: phylumId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the phylum to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: className
featureDescription.description: The name of the class to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: classId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the class to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: orderName
featureDescription.description: The name of the order to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: orderId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the order to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: superfamilyName
featureDescription.description: The name of the superfamily to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: superfamilyId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the superfamily to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: familyName
featureDescription.description: The name of the family to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: familyId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the family to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: subfamilyName
featureDescription.description: The name of the subfamily to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: subfamilyId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the subfamily to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: tribeName
featureDescription.description: The name of the tribe to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: tribeId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the tribe to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: subtribeName
featureDescription.description: The name of the subtribe to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: subtribeId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the subtribe to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: genusName
featureDescription.description: The name of the genus to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: genusId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the genus to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: subgenusName
featureDescription.description: The name of the subgenus to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: subgenusId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the subgenus to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: speciesName
featureDescription.description: The name of the species to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: speciesId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the species to which the taxon belongs, if available.

featureDescription.name: parentName
featureDescription.description: The name of the parent taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: parentId
featureDescription.description: The identifier of the parent taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: scientificName
featureDescription.description: The scientific name of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: canonicalName
featureDescription.description: The canonical name of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: vernacularName
featureDescription.description: The vernacular name of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: acceptedNameUsage
featureDescription.description: The accepted name usage of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: authorship
featureDescription.description: The authorship information for the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: nameType
featureDescription.description: The type of the taxon name, if available.

featureDescription.name: rank
featureDescription.description: The taxonomic rank of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: origin
featureDescription.description: The origin of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: taxonomicStatus
featureDescription.description: The taxonomic status of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: remarks
featureDescription.description: Any additional remarks about the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: references
featureDescription.description: References for the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: publishedIn
featureDescription.description: The publication in which the taxon was published, if available.

featureDescription.name: numDescendants
featureDescription.description: The number of descendant taxa, if available.

featureDescription.name: lastCrawled
featureDescription.description: The date and time when the taxon was last crawled, if available.

featureDescription.name: lastInterpreted
featureDescription.description: The date and time when the taxon was last interpreted, if available.

featureDescription.name: speciesEpithet
featureDescription.description: The species epithet of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: infraspecificEpithet
featureDescription.description: The infraspecific epithet of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: cultivarEpithet
featureDescription.description: The cultivar epithet of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: url
featureDescription.description: A web URL associated with the taxon, provided by the taxonomic database, if available.

featureDescription.name: wikidataId
featureDescription.description: The Wikidata ID of the taxon, if available.

featureDescription.name: wikidataUrl
featureDescription.description: The URL of the Wikidata page for the taxon, if available.
